summary: The actual screenshot partially matches the wireframe for the combat screen, with correct placement of the central combat panel and key elements like attackers and defenders. However, there are discrepancies in border colors, additional debug text, and layout details. The wireframe is partially suitable but lacks specificity for dynamic content and process validations.

correctElements.evidence: Large red-bordered panel present in both with title 'Combat initiated' at top, attackers on left, defenders on right (implied in wireframe), and resolution details below.
Dark starfield/game-map background with stellar bodies and lines matching in both images.
Present on the right side in both, though content differs slightly.
Top-left resource bars (POP, MET, FUEL) present in both.

incorrectElements.expected: Thin green panel borders for all panels
incorrectElements.actual: Central panel has red border, top bar lacks visible green border, some panels have no borders
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Combat panel uses use red border as per description, but global style specifies green; actual uses red consistently but misses green for others, leading to style inconsistency.

incorrectElements.expected: No debug or extraneous text in production screenshot
incorrectElements.actual: Top-right debug string like 'Panels F1 Dbg:On F2 Cmd:Off ...'
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Actual screenshot includes debug information not present in wireframe, indicating non-production state or incomplete cleanup.

incorrectElements.expected: Compact 'Rolls | Pairings | Casualties | Survivors' bar below attackers/defenders
incorrectElements.actual: Expanded vertical list with sections like Attack Rolls, Pairings, Casualties, Survivors on left side
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Layout shifted from horizontal bar to vertical stacking, altering the visual flow and not matching wireframe's compact design.

incorrectElements.expected: No specific advance/skip prompt in wireframe
incorrectElements.actual: Bottom center text 'Press ENTER or SPACE to advance. ESC skips.'
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra control instruction present in actual, not in wireframe; represents a functional element missing from baseline.

incorrectElements.actual: No explicit Defenders section; content implied under Survivors
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe shows balanced attackers left, defenders right; actual consolidates most info on left, leaving right sparse.

incorrectElements.actual: Appears cropped or scaled slightly, with 'top=107' watermark suggesting offset
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Potential DPI/scaling or capture artifact; residual risk that full HWND capture at specified resolution is not exact.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe captures the high-level layout and style but lacks detail on dynamic content, interaction prompts, and validation against repository processes like AGENTS-README-FIRST.yaml. It is suitable for static structure but not for behavioral or process requirements.
missingRequirements: No representation of interactive states or transitions (e.g., advance/skip behavior)
Lacks validation markers for TR-UI-AUDIT-AGENTS-001 process requirements
recommendedWireframeChanges: Add annotations for dynamic text and state changes
Incorporate process compliance indicators, e.g., no debug text
